sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ رَنَا أَنْ تَسْمَعَ الْمُوسِيقَى أَثْنَاءَ الطَّهْيِ.
sentences.translation: Rana je htjela slušati muziku dok kuha.
sentences.translationEn: Rana wanted to listen to music while cooking.

sentences.translation: Otvorila je muzičku aplikaciju na telefonu.
sentences.translationEn: She opened the music app on her phone.

sentences.translation: Odabrala je omiljenu pjesmu i počela kuhati.
sentences.translationEn: She chose her favorite song and started cooking.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْمُوسِيقَى تُسَاعِدُهَا عَلَى الِاسْتِمْتَاعِ بِالطَّهْيِ.
sentences.translation: Muzika joj je pomagala da uživa u kuhanju.
sentences.translationEn: The music helped her enjoy cooking.
